question_html:
Make meaningful sentences with the following words:
‎ Imminent, Resilient, Thrive, Vigilant, Ephemeral
solution_html:
Imminent – The dark clouds signaled an imminent storm.

Resilient – Despite many hardships, she remained resilient and hopeful.

Thrive – Plants thrive when they receive enough sunlight and water.

Vigilant – The guard remained vigilant throughout the night.

Ephemeral – The beauty of a rainbow is ephemeral, lasting only a few moments before it fades.

Mark Distribution:

For making meaningful sentence with the following words (0.5×5) =2.5 marks.

[N.B: Any sentence that is meaningful and correct will get allocated marks]

question_html:
Fill in the blanks with suitable words from the list below:

(List: attentive, stress, creative, harmony, support, respectful)
‎ In order to build a positive and effective learning environment, both students and teachers must fulfill their roles with dedication. A good student should always be (a) ______ during lessons, actively listening and engaging with the content, while also being (b) _____ toward teachers and classmates to maintain a polite and inclusive atmosphere. On the other hand, teachers should offer emotional and academic (c) ______ to students who may be experiencing (d) ______ due to pressure or workload. They must also promote a classroom environment filled with harmony and understanding, where (e) ______ thinking is encouraged and celebrated as a part of learning.
solution_html:
(a) attentive

(b) respectful

(c) support

(d) stress

(e) creative

Mark Distribution:

For filling the blanks with suitable words; (0.5×5) =2.5 marks.

question_html: Write a well organised paragraph on ‘The Value of Time’ in the space provided, considering the element of a paragraph, such as topic sentence, supporting detail sentences and conclusion.
solution_html:
‘The Value of Time’

Time is one of the most precious resources in our lives, and once lost, it can never be regained. It waits for no one and moves forward constantly, making it essential to use every moment wisely. People who understand the value of time tend to lead more disciplined, productive, and successful lives. Time management helps us set priorities, meet deadlines, and reduce stress. Wasting time, on the other hand, leads to missed opportunities and regret. Whether in studies, work, or personal growth, using time effectively brings long-term benefits. Therefore, we must respect time and make the best use of it to build a brighter future.

Marks Distribution:

For writing Title, ‘The Value of Time’; 0.5 mark.

For writing topic sentence such as, People who understand the value of time tend to lead more disciplined, productive, and successful lives. Time management helps us set priorities, meet deadlines, and reduce stress. 1.5 marks.

For writing supporting detail sentences such as, Time management helps us set priorities, meet deadlines, and reduce stress. Wasting time, on the other hand, leads to missed opportunities and regret. Whether in studies, work, or personal growth, using time effectively brings long-term benefits. 1.5 marks.

For writing conclusion such as, whether in studies, work, or personal growth, using time effectively brings long-term benefits. Therefore, we must respect time and make the best use of it to build a brighter future; 1.5 marks.

[Instructions:

* Students must write it within one single para. If it becomes more than one para, 50% marks have to be deducted from the obtained marks.

* 0.5 mark will be deducted for one or two grammar or spelling mistakes, 01 mark for three or more grammar or spelling mistakes.]
